revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月十九]][[zh:八月十九]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 19|qq=August 19}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|782|en|782|qid=Q30550|lt=782 AD|1=782}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|qid=Q2881|lt=September 30|1=September 30}} ) - From {{ill|Ten'ō|en|Ten'ō|qid=Q1373125|lt=Ten'ō|1=Ten'ō}} , an era name change ({{ill|Era name change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era name change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}} ) to Enryaku. * {{ill|Jōgan|en|Jōgan|qid=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|866|en|866|qid=Q23872|lt=866 AD|1=866}} {{ill|October 1|en|October 1|qid=Q2913|lt=October 1|1=October 1}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Yoshifusa|en|Fujiwara no Yoshifusa|qid=Q960841|lt=Fujiwara Yoshifusa|1=Fujiwara no Yoshifusa}} assumed the position of {{ill|Regent|ja|Regent|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Regent|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , becoming the first regent not of imperial lineage. * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1807|en|1807|qid=Q6909|lt=1807 AD|1=1807}} {{ill|September 20|en|September 20|qid=Q2892|lt=September 20|1=September 20}} ) – The {{ill|Eitaibashi Collapse Incident|ja|永代橋崩落事故|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eitaibashi Collapse Incident|1=Eitai Bridge collapse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q85881761}} occurred, resulting in 1,400 casualties (deaths, injuries, and missing persons). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū (era)|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863 AD|1=1863}} {{ill|October 1|en|October 1|qid=Q2913|lt=October 1|1=October 1}} ) – The fall of the seven courtiers; during the {{ill|August 18 Incident|ja|八月十八日の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August 18 Incident|1=8/18 incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1041337}} , {{ill|Sanjō Sanetomi|en|Sanjō Sanetomi|qid=Q516646|lt=Sanjō Sanetomi|1=Sanjō Sanetomi}} and 7 courtiers headed toward {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|lt=Choshu|lt_ja=長州|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q876267}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868 AD|1=1868}} {{ill|October 4|en|October 4|qid=Q2929|lt=October 4|1=October 4}} ) – Vice Admiral {{ill|Enomoto Takeaki|en|Enomoto Takeaki|qid=Q532959|lt=Enomoto Takeaki|1=Enomoto Takeaki}} of the {{ill|Bakufu Navy|ja|幕府海軍|lt=Edō Bakufu Navy|lt_ja=Tokugawa shogunate海軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bakufu Navy|1=Tokugawa Shogunate Navy|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11481799}} led 8 ships of the Bakufu fleet from Edo and set sail toward {{ill|Port of Hakodate|en|Port of Hakodate|qid=Q10896698|lt=Hakodate|1=Port of Hakodate}} . == Births == (Empty) == Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū (era)|1=Kenkyū}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1194|en|1194|qid=Q19743|lt=1194 AD|1=1194}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}} ) – {{ill|Yasuda Yoshisada|en|Yasuda Yoshisada|qid=Q11451109|lt=Yasuda Yoshisada|1=Yasuda Yoshisada}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (born {{ill|1134|en|1134|qid=Q19590|lt=1134 AD|1=1134}} ) * {{ill|Kenmu|en|Kenmu|qid=Q1193970|lt=Kenmu|1=Kenmu}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1335|en|1335|qid=Q6011|lt=1335 AD|1=1335}} {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}} ) – {{ill|Suwa Yorishige (Nanboku-chō period)|en|Suwa Yorishige (Nanboku-chō period)|qid=Q11631966|lt=Suwa Yorishige|1=Suwa Yorishige (Nanboku-chō period)}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown) * Kenmu 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1335|en|1335|qid=Q6011|lt=1335 AD|1=1335}} {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}} ) – {{ill|Suwa Tokitsugu|ja|諏訪時継|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Tokitsugu|1=Suwa Tokitsugu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11631887}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown) * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|qid=Q1145735|lt=Enpō (era)|1=Enpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1680|en|1680|qid=Q7642|lt=1680 AD|1=1680}} {{ill|September 11|en|September 11|qid=Q2851|lt=September 11|1=September 11}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|en|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|qid=Q320229|lt=Emperor Gosui|1=Emperor Go-Mizunoo}} , the 108th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|1596|en|1596|qid=Q6785|lt=1596 AD|1=1596}} ) * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1726|en|1726|qid=Q6936|lt=1726 AD|1=1726}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}} ) – {{ill|Nichikan|ja|日寛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nichikan|1=Nichikan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6581456}} , {{ill|Buddhist priest|ja|Monk侶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buddhist priest|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born {{ill|1665|en|1665|qid=Q7582|lt=1665 AD|1=1665}} ) * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 13rd year {{ill|Intercalation (timekeeping)|en|Intercalation (timekeeping)|qid=Q1225911|lt=Intercalation|1=Intercalation (timekeeping)}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1816|en|1816|qid=Q6953|lt=1816 AD|1=1816}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|qid=Q2921|lt=October 10|1=October 10}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harutoshi|en|Tokugawa Harutoshi|qid=Q728162|lt=Tokugawa Harunori|1=Tokugawa Harutoshi}} , 7th lord of {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} (born {{ill|1773|en|1773|qid=Q7692|lt=1773 AD|1=1773}} ) * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1832|en|1832|qid=Q7584|lt=1832 AD|1=1832}} {{ill|September 13|en|September 13|qid=Q2848|lt=September 13|1=September 13}} ) – {{ill|Nezumi Kozō Jirōkichi|ja|鼠小Monk次郎吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nezumi Kozō Jirōkichi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , {{ill|Banditry|en|Banditry|qid=Q10968653|lt=Thief|1=Banditry}} (born {{ill|1797|en|1797|qid=Q7820|lt=1797 AD|1=1797}} )
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|18|8|20|7|19|9|8|0819|qq=}}
